Subject: M30 vs M35 for severe exposure raft
Question: Design basis lists M30 for the severe-exposure raft; should we upgrade to M35 to improve chloride resistance at the coastal site?

Subject: M25 vs M30 for marine/transformer-yard RCC
Question: Note 7 of the design basis specifies M25 for marine/transformer-yard RCC. IS 456 Cl 8.2.8 requires RCC in/near sea-water to be at least M30. Please confirm grade for footing F-12 and the transformer-yard raft before casting.

Subject: Nominal cover to footing F-12
Question: Shop drawing SUB-0142 shows 30 mm nominal cover to footing F-12. Confirm required cover for footings in severe coastal exposure.

Subject: w/c ratio for severe-exposure concrete
Question: MOS-0210 states free w/c ratio 0.55 for the severe-exposure raft. Please confirm the maximum permissible w/c ratio for severe exposure per Table 5.

Subject: Importance factor for data-centre buildings
Question: Design basis adopts seismic Importance Factor I = 1.0. Given the Tier-III lifeline nature of the facility, should I = 1.5 be adopted per IS 1893 Pt1 Table 8?

Subject: Net safe bearing capacity confirmation
Question: Confirm net SBC of 180 kN/m2 at founding level against the geotechnical report.

Subject: Raised floor finished floor height
Question: Confirm FFH of 900 mm for the anti-static raised access floor in white space.

Subject: CRAH chilled-water supply temperature
Question: Confirm CHW supply temperature of 18 degC for the N+1 CRAH selection.

Subject: DRUPS short-circuit withstand coordination
Question: Confirm fault level 50 kA for 1s at the 415V LV board for DRUPS/switchgear coordination.

Subject: LV switchgear delivery vs critical path
Question: Vendor indicates LV switchgear lead time slipping by ~6 weeks. Confirm impact on commissioning L4 milestone and any acceleration option.

Subject: Construction joint location in raft
Question: Propose construction joint location for the 1240 cum raft pour sequencing.

Subject: Fire-stopping rating at busway penetrations
Question: Confirm 2-hour fire-stopping rating at busway floor penetrations.

Subject: Roof cladding fastener pull-out for cyclonic wind
Question: Confirm fastener pull-out capacity adequate for 50 m/s cyclonic design wind speed.

Subject: Hot-aisle containment clearance to sprinklers
Question: Confirm minimum clearance from hot-aisle containment roof to sprinkler heads.
